strings.schematron.title: DCAT-AP-Vlaanderen - Recommended
strings.dcat-ap-vl-rec.pattern.assert.1: The dcat:Resource doesn't have a data.gov.be theme
strings.dcat-ap-vl-rec.pattern.report.1: The dcat:Resource have a data.gov.be theme
strings.dcat-ap-vl-rec.pattern.title.1: At least one theme from the data.gov.be vocabulary is required
